历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 3264 → 2811 → 2525 → 1999 → 1331, showing a continuous forward trend, with a cumulative forward movement of about 1933 places in the past 4 years, and a 2025 baseline of about 1331 places; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 67 in 2021, 69 in 2022, 67 in 2023, 67 in 2024, and 56 in 2025 (significantly reduced), with the 2026 plan at 56, unchanged from 2025, with no further expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking continuously rising: 19th in 2021 → 18th in 2022 → 16th in 2023 → 14th in 2024 → 13th in 2025 → 14th in 2026, firmly among the top national science and engineering universities; 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving teacher ethics incidents (Gong Lin incident, etc.), but the school's public response was relatively swift; Douyin popularity ranking 47th (relatively hot), short video exposure moderately high, application attention acceptable; no obvious record of admission gaps; Control Science and Engineering A+, Information and Communication Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Mechanical Engineering A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Optical Engineering A, etc., highly matching the enrollment majors (Engineering Experimental Class directions), strongly attractive to candidates. Engineering Experimental Classes (Information Science and Technology, Electronic Information Experimental Class, Xu Teli Talent Class, etc.) correspond to popular directions such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Electronic Information, with sustained high social popularity; Guangdong Province 2026 Physics Category candidates approximately 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% compared to 440,208 in 2025, intensifying competition.

专业热度与地域.text: Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal to Guangdong candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend in historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, the approximately 3.6% increase in Guangdong Physics Category candidates intensifying competition, the school's stable high Soft Science ranking, and the strong alignment of advantageous disciplines with popular majors, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 1331, with rankings continuing to move forward; predicted minimum ranking approximately 1301, range 1145-1457.
